welcome.heading: Let's get started
welcome.subheading_line1: Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem.
welcome.subheading_line2: We suggest starting with the following.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.name: Name
register.terms_accept: I have read and agree to the <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
register.terms_required: You must accept the Terms and Conditions.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.description: Please enter your new password below

confirm_password.title: Confirm your password
confirm_password.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verify_email.title: Verify email
verify_email.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify_email.link_sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

two_factor.recovery_description: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
two_factor.auth_description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.section_description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.resend_verification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verification_link_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

security.password_description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
security.enabled_pin: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
security.enable_intro: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.

privacy.export_description: You can download a file with all personal data we store about you. The file is generated in the background and sent by email.
privacy.delete_description: Deletes your account irreversibly. Personal data (name, email) is anonymized; audit history is preserved as required by law.
privacy.delete_warning_body: Once confirmed, you won't be able to access or recover this account.
privacy.delete_confirm_description: Confirm your password to permanently delete and anonymize your account.
privacy.already_anonymized: This account was already anonymized on {{date}}.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete.warning_body: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
delete.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete.confirm_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

recovery.title: 2FA recovery codes
recovery.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery.notice: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click

setup.enabled_description: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
setup.verify_description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
setup.enable_description: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

cookies.title: Your privacy
cookies.description: We use cookies to keep the site running, measure performance and personalize content. You can choose which categories to allow.
cookies.essential_desc: Required for authentication, security and basic functionality. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analytics_desc: Collect anonymous usage statistics to help us improve the experience.
cookies.marketing_desc: Enable personalized communications and measure campaign effectiveness.
cookies.guest_note: You can review your choices at any time on this page.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.no_terms: No version has been published yet.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage platform users, roles and permissions.
users.dialog_description: Select the roles this user should have.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Create and send notifications to platform users.
notifications.dispatch_confirm_body: The notification will be sent to all configured recipients. This action cannot be undone.
notifications.delete_confirm_body: The draft will be permanently deleted.
notifications.already_dispatched: This notification has already been sent.

form.preview_description: This is how the notification will appear to recipients.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: {{company}} respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data, in accordance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Law No. 13,709/2018) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU 2016/679).
privacy_policy.controller_desc: The company responsible for processing your personal data is:
privacy_policy.dpo_desc: Our Data Protection Officer can be contacted for privacy-related questions, exercise of rights, or inquiries about this policy:
privacy_policy.data_desc: We collect only the data necessary to provide the service:
privacy_policy.data_identification: Identification: name and email address (provided at registration)
privacy_policy.data_technical: Technical: IP address and user agent (recorded on access and security events)
privacy_policy.data_usage: Usage: activity records within the platform (audit log)
privacy_policy.data_consent: Consent: date, time, IP and category of accepted cookies
privacy_policy.purpose_service: Provision and improvement of contracted services
privacy_policy.purpose_legal: Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy_policy.legal_basis_desc: The processing of your data is grounded in the following legal bases (LGPD Art. 7 / GDPR Art. 6):
privacy_policy.legal_basis_contract: Contract performance — data required to provide the service
privacy_policy.legal_basis_legal: Legal obligation — data required by applicable law or regulation
privacy_policy.legal_basis_legitimate: Legitimate interest — security logs and auditing
privacy_policy.retention_desc: We keep your data for as long as necessary for each purpose:
privacy_policy.retention_export: Data export files: {{days}} days after generation
privacy_policy.retention_account: Account data: while the account is active or for the legally required period after closure
privacy_policy.retention_anonymized: After erasure request: anonymized data is retained for {{years}} years for historical record integrity
privacy_policy.rights_desc: Under LGPD (Art. 18) and GDPR (Arts. 15–22), you have the right to:
privacy_policy.rights_access: Access — view what data we hold about you
privacy_policy.rights_rectification: Rectification — correct incomplete or incorrect data
privacy_policy.rights_erasure: Erasure — request anonymization of your data
privacy_policy.rights_portability: Portability — export your data in a structured format (ZIP)
privacy_policy.rights_revocation: Revocation — withdraw cookie consent at any time
privacy_policy.rights_how: To exercise your rights, go to Settings → Privacy or contact the DPO.
privacy_policy.cookies_desc: We use strictly necessary cookies (no consent required) and optional cookies (analytics and marketing), subject to your acceptance in the consent banner. You can change your preferences at any time.
privacy_policy.cookies_essential_desc: Session, authentication, CSRF, language preference. Always active.
privacy_policy.security_desc: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. This includes encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS), optional two-factor authentication, and access monitoring.
privacy_policy.breach_desc: In the event of an incident affecting your data, we will notify the Brazilian National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) and, where applicable, affected data subjects, as required by LGPD (Art. 48) and GDPR (Art. 33), within the legally prescribed timeframes.
privacy_policy.changes_desc: This policy may be updated periodically. When there are material changes, we will request a new acceptance. The current version is always available on this page with the update date.
privacy_policy.contact_desc: Privacy-related questions or requests should be sent to the DPO via the channels listed above or to the controller's email below.

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

419.title: Session Expired
419.description: Your session has expired. Please refresh the page and try again.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: You have made too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: We are under maintenance. We will be back shortly.

default.title: Something went wrong.
default.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
